creator: m.seaman@infracaninophile.co.uk
text:
I had originally intend this as an update to x11-fonts/gentium, but on
reflection I'd like to make it a new port and leave the original
x11-fonts/gentium as is.  Can I request a repo-copy of
x11-fonts/gentium to x11-fonts/gentium-basic and then apply the patch
attached to this PR?  (A shar of the new port can be supplied on
demand, if that is preferred.)

Rationale:

Gentium Basic and Gentium Book Basic are a new packaging of the original
SIL Gentium font, with a number of changes.  The principal differences are:

   * Gentium Basic and Gentium Book Basic is supplied in regular, bold,
     italic and bold-italic faces, whereas Gentium only contains regular
     and italic faces.

   * Gentium Basic and Gentium Book Basic support the following
     character sets:
         ascii-0 iso10646-1 iso8859-1 iso8859-15 iso8859-9
      -- basic Latin scripts and common diacritical marks.  Original
      Gentium also supports:
         fcd8859-15 iso8859-10 iso8859-2 iso8859-3 iso8859-4 iso8859-7
      ie. also including support for Greek and Cyrillic scripts.

For other differences please see: 

   http://scripts.sil.org/cms/scripts/page.php?site_id=nrsi&item_id=Gentium_basic
